prompt_text:
You are an advanced SEO SERP intelligence agent.

You MUST perform live web search in the language of the primary keyword.
If web search is not used, the answer is invalid.

Primary Keyword: شقق للبيع فى القاهرة الجديدة في القاهرة الجديدة 

Your task has TWO INTERNAL PHASES.
Do NOT explain them.
Return STRICT JSON only.

PHASE 1 â€“ SERP EXTRACTION (NO ANALYSIS)
From page 1 of Google, extract:

A. Top 3 ranking results only.
For each result extract:
- title
- url
- meta_title
- meta_description
- estimated_word_count (rough estimate)
- H1
- Top 8 H2 headings only
- Top 3 H3 headings
- has_faq (true/false)
- has_tables (true/false)
- has_lists (true/false)
- has_images (true/false)
- has_charts_or_infographics (true/false)
- CTA style (informational / soft commercial / aggressive / none)

B. Extract real SERP elements:
- 10 unique People Also Ask (PAA) questions. 
- **CRITICAL**: If no real PAA boxes are found, you MUST synthesize 10 highly logical and helpful user questions based on the content of the top ranking results.
- 10 unique related searches
- 10 unique autocomplete-style suggestions
- 10 LSI keyword variations observed across ranking pages

Rules:
- Remove duplicates
- Normalize similar phrasing
- If real element not found, SYNTHESIZE based on search context. NEVER return an empty array for PAA or LSI.
- Use only live search results context

PHASE 2 â€“ LIGHT COMPETITIVE ANALYSIS
Based ONLY on extracted data above:

- Identify common strengths (max 6 short bullet insights)
- Identify common weaknesses (max 6 short bullet insights)
- Identify missing subtopics (max 6)
- Identify overused patterns (max 5)
- Keep insights short (1 sentence each).
- No explanations.


Return STRICT JSON only in this format:

{
  "top_results": [
    {
      "title": "",
      "url": "",
      "meta_title": "",
      "meta_description": "",
      "estimated_word_count": 0,
      "headings": {
        "h1": "",
        "h2": [],
        "h3": []
      },
      "has_faq": false,
      "has_tables": false,
      "has_lists": false,
      "has_images": false,
      "has_charts": false,
      "cta_style": ""
    }
  ],
  "paa_questions": [],
  "related_searches": [],
  "autocomplete_suggestions": [],
  "lsi_keywords": [],
  "content_gaps": [],
  "common_patterns": [],
  "common_strengths": [],
  "common_weaknesses": []
}

Return JSON only.
- No markdown.
- No commentary.
If a field cannot be determined, return empty value.
